name: 完形填空 · 第一辑（乡村之夏）
desc: 一篇记叙文完形，8 个空，练时态一致 + 词义搭配（中考完形核心）。每空带全文面板，联系上下文再选。免费档。

m5.why: Last summer 提示一般过去时，go 的过去式 went。
m5.passage: Last summer, I ①___ to a small village with my family. The air there was very ②___ and the people were friendly. Every morning I ③___ up early and helped the farmers. One day, I ④___ a little dog by the river. It was hungry, so I ⑤___ it some bread. From then on, the dog ⑥___ me everywhere. When we left, I felt ⑦___ to say goodbye. I will never ⑧___ that summer.

m5.why: 乡村空气 + friendly 语境积极，fresh（清新）最搭。
m5.passage: Last summer, I ①___ to a small village with my family. The air there was very ②___ and the people were friendly. Every morning I ③___ up early and helped the farmers. One day, I ④___ a little dog by the river. It was hungry, so I ⑤___ it some bread. From then on, the dog ⑥___ me everywhere. When we left, I felt ⑦___ to say goodbye. I will never ⑧___ that summer.

m5.q: 第 ③ 空应选：（get up 早起）
m5.why: 过去时叙事，get up 的过去式 got up。
m5.passage: Last summer, I ①___ to a small village with my family. The air there was very ②___ and the people were friendly. Every morning I ③___ up early and helped the farmers. One day, I ④___ a little dog by the river. It was hungry, so I ⑤___ it some bread. From then on, the dog ⑥___ me everywhere. When we left, I felt ⑦___ to say goodbye. I will never ⑧___ that summer.

m5.why: One day 过去时，find 的过去式 found。
m5.passage: Last summer, I ①___ to a small village with my family. The air there was very ②___ and the people were friendly. Every morning I ③___ up early and helped the farmers. One day, I ④___ a little dog by the river. It was hungry, so I ⑤___ it some bread. From then on, the dog ⑥___ me everywhere. When we left, I felt ⑦___ to say goodbye. I will never ⑧___ that summer.

m5.why: 过去时，give 的过去式 gave（喂了它一些面包）。
m5.passage: Last summer, I ①___ to a small village with my family. The air there was very ②___ and the people were friendly. Every morning I ③___ up early and helped the farmers. One day, I ④___ a little dog by the river. It was hungry, so I ⑤___ it some bread. From then on, the dog ⑥___ me everywhere. When we left, I felt ⑦___ to say goodbye. I will never ⑧___ that summer.

m5.why: From then on 承接过去，follow 的过去式 followed（从此跟着我）。
m5.passage: Last summer, I ①___ to a small village with my family. The air there was very ②___ and the people were friendly. Every morning I ③___ up early and helped the farmers. One day, I ④___ a little dog by the river. It was hungry, so I ⑤___ it some bread. From then on, the dog ⑥___ me everywhere. When we left, I felt ⑦___ to say goodbye. I will never ⑧___ that summer.

m5.why: 离别 say goodbye，felt sad（难过）最合上下文。
m5.passage: Last summer, I ①___ to a small village with my family. The air there was very ②___ and the people were friendly. Every morning I ③___ up early and helped the farmers. One day, I ④___ a little dog by the river. It was hungry, so I ⑤___ it some bread. From then on, the dog ⑥___ me everywhere. When we left, I felt ⑦___ to say goodbye. I will never ⑧___ that summer.

m5.q: 第 ⑧ 空应选：（will never ___）
m5.why: will never 后接动词原形；never forget（永不忘记）符合怀念语气。
m5.passage: Last summer, I ①___ to a small village with my family. The air there was very ②___ and the people were friendly. Every morning I ③___ up early and helped the farmers. One day, I ④___ a little dog by the river. It was hungry, so I ⑤___ it some bread. From then on, the dog ⑥___ me everywhere. When we left, I felt ⑦___ to say goodbye. I will never ⑧___ that summer.
